programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: Spacehunter Adventures in the Forbidden Zone
programme.desc: A crash-landed salvager Peter Strauss meets a waif Molly Ringwald and saves women from a cyborg Michael Ironside on Terra 11

programme.title: Terror At London Bridge
programme.desc: When the London bridge is fully laid a murder spree begins Don Gregory suspects that the bridges historical link to Jack The Ripper and the Thames River may have something to do with the killings

programme.title: Leave of Absence
programme.desc: When a married mans mistress falls seriously ill he must make the toughest choice of his life

programme.title: Perry Mason The Case of the Telltale Talk Show Host
programme.desc: Dr Sheila Carlin is good friends with Della who calls Perry in when she is being pestered by someone On the theory that it could be somebody that she works with at a radio stations she arranges Perry to be interviewed by Winslow Keene who is also the stations owner Winslow enrages the rest of the talk show hosts on the station by informing them of changes that he is making to their time slots That night Winslow is shot by a hit man hired by someone at the station and Sheila is set up for the murder She calls in Perry and as usual Perry Della and Ken swing into action to find out who really did it

programme.title: TBH 214
programme.desc: TBH 214

programme.title: The Gravest Military Mistakes In History- Tin Soldiers
programme.desc: 20th Century beliefs that a new military technology would bring about cleaner wars and reduce casualties are confounded in this look at modern warfare from the Battle of the Somme to the Gulf War

programme.title: Song of the Gringo
programme.desc: Several miners are killed and their mines are confiscated by a mysterious person Tex an undercover cop is asked to investigate the murders However Tex ends up being implicated as a criminal

programme.title: The One Eyed Soldiers
programme.desc: A doctors unexpected death in a central European republic sets a series of chilling events into motion

programme.title: 3 10 to Yuma
programme.desc: 3 10 to Yuma

programme.title: Rough Riders Round Up
programme.desc: Now that the Spanish-American war is over Roy and other Rough Riders become border patrolmen Their goal is to stop outlaws who are stealing gold from stagecoaches and express offices

programme.title: Springtime in the Rockies
programme.desc: Broadway partners Vicky Lane and Dan Christy have a tiff over Christys womanizing Jealous Vicky takes up with her old flame and former dance partner Victor Price and Dans career takes a nosedive In hopes of rekindling their romance and getting Vicky back on the boards with him Dan follows her to a ritzy resort in the Canadian Rockies where she and Victor are about to open their new act But things get complicated when Dan wakes after a bender to find that hes hired an outlandish Latin secretary Rosita Murphy which makes Vicky think hes just up to his old tricks again

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick discovers an ancient terrifying evil is behind a series of grizzly murders plaguing the city and he may not be able to stop it

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki and Ryan race to find an old World Series ring that enables its owner to see gambling results before they happen

programme.title: Trilogy of Terror
programme.desc: The same woman Karen Black appears in three tales as a blackmailed teacher a tormented lover and opposite sisters

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Billys mother has remarried She Billy and his new stepfather move into their new house on Mothers Day The house is in Springwood The stepfather has a difficult temper and Billy wants more attention from his mother As soon as they arrive they leave Billy alone since they are going on their honeymoon Then he meets his new neighbor the beautiful Barbara who convinces him to organize a party whose outcome will be fatal Meanwhile a radio psychologist finds herself in trouble when she gives bad advice to her listeners She is Barbaras mother and is obsessed with her job as a radio celebrity and needs to put her daughter first

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Lies not been easy for actress Helen Shes getting older and her dreams of hitting the big time are disappearing When she gets a chance to take part in a beauty contest shes determined to do ANYTHING to win

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Married couple Fred and Ermas restaurant has seen better days But things change once a stranger walks in with a rather unique steak recipe

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Predatory electronics salesman Jack Rhodes uses a video dating service to pick up lonely young women for one-night stands but meets his match in cunning enticing Barbara who invites Jack on a date to her high-rise apartment loft

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: While passing through a small town Eric is shot and buried by a deranged cop-wannabe who is murdering vagrants while impersonating a police officer Alamo Joe catches up to Eric and Eric convinces him that the phony cop is a serial killer

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric comes into a town looking for Skorzany after hearing about several murders by a skinwalker He learns from a Native American medicine man that there may be a cure In the end Eric finds out that the cure was a lie and he moves on

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: It has been more than forty years since Nick has seen his close friend Katherine Barrington and her secretary Madelyn Pinchot

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: The Posts neighbor Roger catches Mister Ed and Wilbur talking to each other

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Learning that the German army is manufacturing an improved Tiger tank Hogan and his men are determined to steal one so they can disassemble it and make blueprints for the Allies

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan concocts a Kommandant of the Year award to distract Klink so a new Nazi rocket being stored protectively at Stalag 13 can be sabotaged

programme.title: Mchales Navy
programme.desc: Trouble follows when Gruber - In competition with a hometown neighbor for the greatest War Hero - Is awarded a Purple Heart for a small cut on his finger which he got while doing laundry

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: McHale and The Boys go all out to try to help Parker win the attention of a very attractive Nurse hes infatuated with

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: A trouble maker transfers into the platoon and decides to make Pyle his patsy Gomer tries to handle it with understanding and kindness - but soon learns that bullies need to be stood up against

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: After being bawled out by Sgt Carter for not working hard enough Gomer decides not accept his pay for that week which causes all sorts of troubles for Sgt Carter

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The hungry castaways find a wild duck on the island but they dont know whether to use it as food or attach a message to him and hope for rescue

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligans Christmas wish appears to be coming true when a radio broadcast tells them their rescue is imminent While they wait they recall the first days on the island when Gilligan lost the radio and transmitter

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: To join a secret club known as the Imperial Demons Little Luke must go into an abandoned haunted house at night and succeed in taking a light all the way to the top floor

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa tries to marry off a friend in danger of being deported

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max is assigned to protect the winner of the Miss USA contest

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: An Arabian prince is protected by Max and an Israeli agent

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: A team has made a super computer police car that can tell everything wrong with vehicles generating huge for police depts FBI etc They target and harass BJ McKay and others to put them out of business BJ and his friends decide to fight back against this car that seems to know their every step

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: After Ed starts giving Wilbur nothing but winning picks at the race track everyone wants to get in on the gravy train - including Carol and Kays milk fund for the school kids

programme.title: Morning Departure
programme.desc: Trouble arises when 12 men realize that only eight of them can escape from the sinking submarine that has collided with a mine left over from the war

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Bubblecrafts rise out of the waters Bubblemen are directed by Brotak to kidnap Zandor and TaraAndropon sends his robots to attack the Herculoids only to be defeated Zandor accepts his challenge as he sends his best warrior Ogron

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Dr Claw plans to use a flock of trained birds to steal a precious jewel

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: MAD is threatening to steal the King of Fuzugs treasure Inspector Gadgets mission is to save the treasure from Dr Claw

programme.title: Enter the Ninja
programme.desc: After passing a ninja master test in Japan Cole visits a war buddy in the Philippines He helps him fight men who want his buddys plantation

programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Wills past comes back to haunt him not only in his dreams but here in his new home when a friend shows up who was involved in a robbery

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The Alphans encounter the Voyager space probe that has been wandering the cosmos propelled by the Queller drive- a faulty engine system Following the probe is a fleet of alien ships from a world devastated by the drive

programme.title: Wavelength
programme.desc: Two young lovers learn that a small group of child-like space aliens are marooned on Earth and are being held prisoner at a top secret military facility The couple then decide to liberate the extraterrestrial castaways and help them make a rendezvous with a rescue ship sent from the alien home planet

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Family friend Swamp Molly asks Bo and Luke to deliver a load of moonshine but the shipment is really illegal firearms

programme.title: Hercules 222
programme.desc: Hercules 222

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Zoor and Daan travel to a cloister for an energy sharing ceremony but one of the sisters is killed and everyone is a suspect

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The Blackwood team consults with noted linguist Adrian Bouchard Cedric Smith to decipher the aliens transmissions

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane has created a poison engineered to specifically target Swamp Things genetic code Ann has discovered a method of temporarily changing Alec back to human form

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon go undercover at a hotel to find the location of an illegal gambling operation Soon after spreading the word theyre looking for some action they are driven to a late-night game in the Hollywood Hills After the game the detectives give the location of the residence to their boss and a raid is set for the following night

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: While fleeing authorities Dr Kimble discovers a man who is deathly ill and is also being pursued by the law

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: While travelling cross country Victoria and Heath have an accident resulting in Heath becoming pinned under their heavily loaded wagon Victoria seeks help and turns to a mysterious man who is being pursued by aggressive bounty hunters

programme.desc: A lonely maiden woman in her mid 40s is stalked and targeted by a psychotic drifter Meanwhile she has a long term affair with a Canadian political leader Stone and Keller need to solve several mysteries

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: The IMFs target is Poltroni an international drug dealer Poltroni alias Ted Carson is in a country with no extradition treaty with the United States Briggs devises a plan to lure Poltroni to a neighboring country where he can be arrested and sent to the US To execute the scheme Barney will have to fight for his life against one of Poltronis thugs while Cinammon will be bait for Poltroni Also getting Poltroni to the border wont be easy Its about 100 miles away

programme.desc: Friday and Gannon work the hospital round They are called to talk to a mentally-challenged man who threatens to blow up a radio station

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Peter Arbeau brings strong Muay Thai influences to his MMA matches. After travelling the world over constantly seeing out new training and competition experiences, Peter is more than re//ady for his next fight at HK37. This is an intense bout against an equally skilled Matt Krayco, with fists and legs flying.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Motivated by watching UFC fights, Shawn Fitzsimmons was eager to start training in MMA. After a stint teaching self defense classes in Europe, Shawn is ready to prove his skills in the cage. As the main event at HK37, he takes on Ryan Dickson in the Lightweight division.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Morgan Heraud v. Damir Ismagulov

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Miami Beach on April 26, 2018, Karate Combat: Inception is the first event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Held as a private, invite-only spectacle, this video stream will show all of the key fighters, as it happens. Featured on the Main Card: Elhadji "Black Magic" Ndour of the United States versus Andras “The Titan” Virag, a game contender from Hungary. The co-main event features Dionicio Gustavo of the Dominican Republic versus France's Alexandre Bouderbane in a key contest. Other fighters include Adham Sabry of the USA, Spyros Margaritopoulos of Greece, and Joshua Quayhagen from the USA.

programme.title: SEC State of Mind
programme.desc: Former SEC Player of the Year and nine-year NFL veteran Jason Campbell teams up with ESPN reporter Taylor Davis on SEC State of Mind. With experience from the field to the booth to the sideline, they bring fresh insight and access while covering the entire Southeastern Conference.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Ruffino & Joe Show
programme.desc: Blake Ruffino and Joe DeLeone join forces to talk about the latest in the SEC and College Football

programme.title: Bleav in Bengals
programme.desc: Solomon Wilcots hits the mics to talk Bengals football. After covering the field for the 'Who Dey?' nation

programme.title: Bleav In Commanders
programme.desc: Welcome to the Bleav in Commanders show hosted by former Washington WR Anthony Armstrong and Scott Jackson .We are proud to be a part of the Bleav Podcast Network! We provide insight on the Washington Commanders to the best fan base in the NFL! All content is for the fans, and by the fans. LET’S GO WASHINGTON!

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: See Ball Get Ball
programme.desc: Hosted by David Pollack, a College Football Hall of Famer, three-time First-Team All-American from the University of Georgia, and first-round NFL Draft pick, this podcast provides honest analysis of the most significant stories, matchups, and moments in the world of college football.

programme.title: Bleav in Giants
programme.desc: The broadcast team of commentator Bob Papa and New York Giants legend Carl Banks bring you weekly analysis on your New York Giants.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: Bleav in Texans
programme.desc: Bleav in Texans is your go-to podcast for everything Houston Texans, hosted by former NFL wide receiver Cecil Shorts III and former defensive tackle and sports radio host Seth Payne.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Kendall Ferguson Interview
programme.desc: The hilarious Chicago Comedian Kendall Ferguson returns to the show to talk about his new book and why he needs to stop stealing

programme.title: The DC Glenn Exclusive Interview
programme.desc: Meet the man who created a 90s anthem that set the trend for Hip Hop Music today

programme.title: The Cynda Williams Interview
programme.desc: Meet the lady who became a star in the 1990s hit movie Mo Betta Blues Hear how selling herself out to become rich was and still isnt an option

programme.title: The Chico Brown Exclusive Interview
programme.desc: From being the Co-defendant to Rick Ross to becoming a successful film maker Chico Brown stops by the show to set the record straight

programme.title: The Sean Kanan Interview
programme.desc: Sherard sits down with Cobra Kai star Sean Kanan aka Mr Mike Barnes Learn how the success of Karate Kid 3 and Cobra Kai still amazes him

programme.title: The Jaxx Kellerman Interview
programme.desc: Meet this young lady who writes and performs with a real chip on her shoulder Jaxx Kellerman on the Sherard Show

programme.title: The Harold Vann II Interview
programme.desc: Hear the riveting story of a preacher whose promiscuous life almost destroyed him

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Dragon Lord and Mother Brain try to turn every dragon evil The N team rescues Puff a white last good dragon baby

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The city of Turad is ruled by a demon queen According to an old prophecy she will be defeated only by a child of a stargazer The team is trying to fulfill the prophecy but for them to succeed Diana will have to make a hard choice

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Eric carelessly opens a magic box thereby summoning the Ultimate Evil which threatens to destroy everything Even Dungeon Master is no match for it

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget protects a man who knows too much

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget guards a priceless coin collection

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Cy-Kill and Dr Braxis join forces to steal an experimental energy crystal

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Leader-1 is shot by Crasher while attempting to destroy Cy-Kills pulsar generator

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Audrics image is being projected from a body of water on a planet Jayce goes down to investigate even though Monster Minds are busy draining the water off Jayce meets the fish people the XHal and the Old One and they communicate by telepathy

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: On the ice planet Auriga revolutionary leader Cyrilla makes a deal with Saw Boss -- she delivers Jayce in return for Saw Boss deposing the gangster casino owner Marduk whos made slaves of everyone on the planet Cyrilla realizes her error

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM are on the hunt to find the missing part of the Emerald Arrowhead which will lead to an alien spacecraft the Star Chariot

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: MASK are on a mission to recover hugely radioactive plutonium that VENOM have stolen from an army vehicle

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
